description:
Goal
Port the remaining outcome-golden fixtures onto the new fixtures2 contract harness and delete the old fixture_matrix golden_outcomes mechanism plus its sidecars.

Signal
- ast_eval, closure_typed_captures, curried_add, fib_tailrec, and multi_clause are covered by fixtures2 compiler contracts
- fixture_matrix no longer owns golden_outcomes
- no expected.outcomes sidecars remain under fixtures/

Strategy
1. Re-express each current expected.outcomes fixture in the new contract surface using semantic edges, metrics, and snapshots only where justified.
2. Delete the ignored static trial and remove the temporary-disable plumbing around it.
3. Remove legacy sidecars and update docs/examples to point at the new mechanism.

Validation
- the migrated fixtures pass under the new harness
- cargo test --workspace passes without golden_outcomes ignore debt
- the old sweep and sidecars are gone from the tree

Removal targets
- tests/fixture_matrix.rs golden_outcomes trial
- fixtures/*/expected.outcomes
- temporary ignore ownership for this surface
title: Migrate outcome-golden fixtures and remove old-world sweep
